candidate_b.exact_text_utf8:
Return exactly one concise, complete, executable Python source file.
Use the exact required function name and parameters, include required imports, and finish the implementation within the output limit.
Do not use Markdown fences or explanatory text; output only Python code.

evaluation.order: generation -> identical frozen Pipeline -> H0/H1 fork -> evaluation

p1.prompt: official prompt + fixed separator + Candidate B exact text

promotion_gates.joint_activation: formal validation remains forbidden unless both final P1 and final Healer are separately frozen after all applicable gates
promotion_gates.p1_claim: correctness improvement only if rescues > regressions and exact McNemar p < 0.05

selection.rationale: use exactly half of the 56 unused tasks and preserve the other half for one independent protocol if qualification fails
